---
title: "weekly temperature tracker"
format: html
---
Our project will be a weekly temperature tracker program. The program will record daily temperatures for a week, calculate the average, minimum, and maximum, and generate a graph showing trends, highlighting the highest and lowest temperature days.  
Goals: The goal of our program is to track the weekly high and low temperatures in Oklahoma City on a daily basis and record them in our program. The program will then calculate the average, minimum, and maximum temperatures while also generating a graph showing trends. 
Data Resources: National Weather Service website gives the high and low temperatures every day in Oklahoma City. Apple Weather App also gives temperatures in Oklahoma City. 
## Initial Code / Data

```{python}
days = ["Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri","Sat","Sun"]
temps = [72,75,70,68,74,77,73]

avg_temp = sum(temps)/len(temps)
min_temp = min(temps)
max_temp = max(temps)

print("Average:", avg_temp)
print("Min:", min_temp)
print("Max:", max_temp)
```

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.plot(days, temps, marker="o")
plt.title("Weekly Temperature Trends")
plt.xlabel("Day")
plt.ylabel("Temperature (°F)")
plt.show()
```
